name: cross-loop integration map document at pr-corpus/cross-loop-map.yaml lists every consumer downstream loop
command: [ -s "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/cross-loop-map.yaml" ] && grep -q 'consumers:' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/cross-loop-map.yaml" && grep -q 'standards' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/cross-loop-map.yaml" && grep -q 'compliance' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/cross-loop-map.yaml" && grep -q 'rubric' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/cross-loop-map.yaml" && echo ok 1>&2
